goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Migration, uncertainty, intake, confirmation, FEFO, attribution, leftovers, origin gates, formatting, and OpenAPI evidence are substantially sound. Rejection is required because definitive shortage rows omit recipe IDs and serving/contribution provenance and write sourceRecipeIds as an empty array. Shopping-row edits and override flags are separate writes, while inventory undo commits before the cook-plan state transition. The active Next process also leaves build and rendered workflow proof unavailable.

worker_package.objective: Repair complete grocery provenance, atomic shopping overrides, atomic inventory undo plus cook-plan state, conflict regressions, and retry-stable distinct intake operation keys without changing migration history or audited availability semantics.
verify: pnpm exec prettier --check <T017 allowed source, tests, and docs>
pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/pantry-grocery-cooking.test.ts tests/unit/cooking.test.ts
stop_if: Repair would edit migration 0020, an earlier migration, or the migration journal.
Repair would make uncertainty numeric, alter required-first allocation, weaken ActorContext or trusted-origin checks, or permit unconfirmed deduction.
Atomic undo cannot preserve all conflict checks.
Concurrent dirty work cannot be preserved or files outside scope are required.

evidence: Definitive demand provenance lacks recipe, servings, and contribution data and generated sourceRecipeIds is empty.
Shopping mutation and override recording are separate writes.
Inventory undo commits before cook-plan state transition.
Migration 0020 is additive and uncertainty, FEFO, ActorContext, trusted-origin, intake, and leftovers remain sound.
Scoped Prettier, OpenAPI, and git diff checks pass; active Next dev remains untouched.

parallel_safety.rationale: The repair shares service transaction boundaries, provenance contracts, UI, and tests, so one Worker must own it.

missing_evidence: Atomic override and undo boundaries with conflict regressions
Fresh full build and final Pantry oracle
required_board_updates: Require another Judge before final acceptance.
